title: karta doc-gardner config
description: Opt-in switch for karta's automatic documentation correction. Presence with enabled:true turns the doc-gardner delivery phase on for every karta-deliver run in the repo. This file is the only static element — what to gardner is recomputed live each run and is never enumerated here.

enabled.description: true turns on the automatic doc-gardner phase; absent or false leaves it off.

focus.description: Optional freeform guidance biasing the gardner's attention (e.g. 'keep the public API docs honest'). NOT a list of docs and never limits the surface swept.
